description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on workflow dispatch, push to any branch except markdown files, and pull requests except markdown files. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and pull requests. It uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12 on ubuntu-latest. For each Python version, it checks out the code, sets up Python with pip caching, installs dependencies, runs make test, and optionally uploads test artifacts to GitHub Pages if the reference is master and the Python version is 3.12. A separate deploy job with write permissions for GitHub Pages waits for the test job to succeed and deploys to GitHub Pages if the reference is master.
